games.name: Bubblehead Ball
games.description: Are you a guy who is a talented with skills and speed? If yes, lets score. Bubblehead Ball is a thrilling and fast-paced football game where you can challenge your opponents and show your abilities. One more thing, all of our characters in game are not in football world. 1. Easy to control. 2. Funny characters. 3. Fantastic art. 4. Easy UX UI to access. Lets play and find out who they are.
games.instructions: Using AD to move left or right W to jump J and K for taking shot

games.name: Tank Soccer Battle 1 2 3 4 Player
games.description: Are you ready for a tank battle with your friends? A tank battle with a soccer ball! Bring your friends and fight with tanks.Fill up your tanks&amp;rsquo; ammunition and blow up all your friends&amp;rsquo; tanks. While blowing up your friends&amp;rsquo; tanks, don&amp;rsquo;t forget to shoot the soccer ball. The player who gets the soccer ball to the goal wins. You need to score a goal to win. Team up with your friend in a 2vs2 game and work together to score a goal.
games.instructions: Green Tank Use WASD to move and Q to fire Blue Tank Use Arrow Keys to move and P to fire Yellow Tank Use UHJK to move and M to fire Red Tank Use FCVB to move and N to fire

games.name: Soccer Trainer
games.description: Soccer Trainer is a casual football game that tests your reaction and hand speed Players can make a very interesting football competition game on their mobile phones. Players can experience very exciting football,
games.instructions: You can now play freely on your mobile phone train two players with two fingers and let them pass through various obstacles It will take you into a new model of the football world

games.name: SOCCER Simulator
games.description: SOCCER Simulator is an exciting 3D football experience where you control the ball, aim perfectly, and score amazing goals! Test your skills, improve your accuracy, and become a soccer champion in this realistic and fun simulation game. Enjoy smooth controls, dynamic gameplay, and immersive 3D stadium visuals. Challenge yourself to score from different angles and distances while mastering ball control and precision shots. Are you ready to dominate the field and become the ultimate soccer legend?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Fill The Glass With Juice
games.description: A bright and calming puzzle game based on realistic fluid physics. Feel like a virtual juice master! Your task is to help the freshly squeezed orange juice find its way to the glass by drawing whimsical paths and channels for it. Enjoy the spectacle as the juicy orange liquid cheerfully spills and flows along the trajectories you created. The levels gradually become more difficult, introducing new obstacles and challenges that will require your wit and precision. Its the perfect game to relax, train your logic, and enjoy the colorful visuals and engaging gameplay. Will you be able to fill the glass to the brim without spilling a single drop
games.instructions: Swipe your finger or mouse cursor on a computer across the screen to draw a path-channel for the juice Release your finger mdash and the orange juice will flow along the route you created Your goal is to fill the glass to the required level

games.name: Head Football Game
games.description: Head Soccer is the ultimate football games where skill, speed, and strategy decide who wins the match. Jump onto the pitch for fast-paced soccer battles, score epic goals, and compete to become the champion!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Soccer Guantone Mobile
games.description: Take on Guantone the sassy goalkeeper and the Hungry Giant in this funny, fast-paced soccer adventure! Score penalties, avoid blocks, collect diamonds, and reach 12 goals to win the cup, +7000 points, and an epic celebration with balloons and donuts! A happy, silly, and thrilling game for kids, teens, and anyone who loves big laughs and crazy soccer fun!
games.instructions: Controls Mobile Version Essential Touch Controls Ball Movement Tap the Left Right buttons on the screen Shooting and Aim Tap the Shoot Button Your tap doesnt just shoot it locks the Auto Aim at that precise moment Victory is all about timing

games.name: Soccer Guantone
games.description: Take on Guantone the sassy goalkeeper and the Hungry Giant in this funny, fast-paced soccer adventure! Score penalties, avoid blocks, collect diamonds, and reach 12 goals to win the cup, +7000 points, and an epic celebration with balloons and donuts! A happy, silly, and thrilling game for kids, teens, and anyone who loves big laughs and crazy soccer fun!
games.instructions: Stop the aiming reticle in time to shoot click your favorite balls and watch out for Guantone and the Hungry Giant New soccer balls and surprises coming soon mdash more fun with every update
